content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward signals (from ICM/RND frameworks) can be used as a pruning and selection objective for designing neural architectures that support structured episodic memory for long-horizon planning, rewarding architectures that grow memory modules capable of storing surprising, under-explored transitions instead of uniformly memorizing all experience.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
